name: customer-email-unique
description: Customer email must be unique

name: customer-active-email-condition
description: Active customers must have an email address
expression: is_active = true AND email IS NOT NULL

name: account-balance-positive
description: Account balance must be non-negative

name: transaction-amount-limit
description: Transaction amount must not exceed daily limit

name: customer-kyc-verified
description: Customer KYC must be completed

name: account-active-status
description: Account must be in active status

name: interest-rate-range
description: Interest rate must be within valid range

name: minimum-balance-required
description: Account must maintain minimum balance

name: transaction-date-valid
description: Transaction date must be within last 30 days

name: loan-eligibility-score
description: Loan applicant must have minimum credit score

name: customer-account-consistency
description: Customer ID must link to valid account

name: deposit-amount-valid
description: Deposit amount must be positive and non-null
expression: deposit_amount > 0 AND deposit_amount IS NOT NULL

name: email-format-validation
description: Customer email must follow valid email format

name: phone-number-format
description: Phone number must be 10 digits

name: account-type-valid
description: Account type must be one of approved values

name: fraud-detection-high-transaction
description: Flag transactions exceeding average by 5x
expression: amount > (SELECT AVG(amount)*5 FROM transactions WHERE customer_id = NEW.customer_id)

name: loan-payment-schedule-consistency
description: Loan payment dates must be during business days

name: card-expiration-valid
description: Card expiration date must be in future

name: cardholder-name-not-null
description: Cardholder name cannot be empty or null
expression: cardholder_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(cardholder_name)) > 0

name: unique-account-number
description: Account numbers must be unique across system

name: employer-record-exists
description: Employer ID must exist in employer master table

name: transaction-fee-quantile-95
description: 95th percentile of transaction fee must stay under 50000

name: customer-filtered-row-count
description: At least one customer in the seeded violation segment should be present

name: transaction-row-count-five
description: Transaction feed must contain exactly five rows

name: transaction-total-amount-sum
description: Transaction total_amount must sum to 515

name: transaction-total-amount-min
description: Transaction total_amount must have a minimum of 20

name: transaction-total-amount-max
description: Transaction total_amount must have a maximum of 250

name: seed-my-rules-view
description: Seed case: owned rule in current workspace

name: seed-team-rules-view
description: Seed case: team rule in current workspace

name: seed-all-rules-view-cross-workspace
description: Seed case: rule defined elsewhere but using current workspace objects

name: seed-global-only-view
description: Seed case: rule defined elsewhere using non-current workspace objects
